raw_consumer_statement:
My Citi/AAdvantage Platinum Select World Elite Mastercard card was closed by Citi bank XXXX XX/XX/XXXX. 

After XXXX months, there was a charge on my closed card ending in XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. It was {$33.00} for XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - Virtual Account Number XXXX. And there was another XXXX late payment fees for this transaction. First XXXX was on XX/XX/XXXX for {$30.00} and {$0.00}. Second one was on XX/XX/XXXX for {$41.00} and {$1.00}. 

There is no way that new transactions would show up on a closed account. 

I called Citi bank several times about this transaction. And they delay the dispute over and over again.
